name: Pallavi Rani
title: Data Scientist & Machine Learning Engineer
about: I'm a passionate Data Scientist with expertise in machine learning, deep learning, and statistical analysis. With a strong foundation in mathematics and computer science, I specialize in building intelligent systems that solve real-world problems. My work spans across predictive modeling, natural language processing, computer vision, and big data analytics. I thrive on transforming complex datasets into actionable insights and developing scalable ML solutions that drive business value.

projects.title: Customer Churn Prediction System
projects.description: Built an ML model to predict customer churn with 94% accuracy using ensemble methods. Implemented feature engineering pipeline and deployed REST API for real-time predictions.

projects.title: NLP-Based Sentiment Analysis Platform
projects.description: Developed a sentiment analysis system processing 10M+ social media posts daily. Utilized BERT transformers and created interactive dashboards for insights visualization.

projects.title: Computer Vision Object Detection
projects.description: Implemented YOLO-based real-time object detection system for warehouse automation. Achieved 97% mAP on custom dataset with edge deployment optimization.

projects.title: Time Series Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Created LSTM-based forecasting model for inventory management predicting demand patterns. Reduced forecasting error by 35% compared to traditional methods.

timeline.title: Senior Data Scientist
timeline.description: Leading ML initiatives and mentoring junior data scientists in developing production-ready models

timeline.title: Data Scientist
timeline.description: Developed predictive models and data pipelines for client analytics projects

timeline.title: Junior Data Analyst
timeline.description: Performed statistical analysis and created visualization dashboards for business insights

timeline.title: B.S. in Computer Science
timeline.description: Graduated with honors, specialization in Machine Learning and AI

achievements.title: Best ML Model Award
achievements.description: Won company-wide hackathon for developing innovative fraud detection system

achievements.title: Published Research Paper
